nasb.text: The anger of the Lord burned against Uzza, so He struck him down because he put out his hand to the ark; and he died there before God.

esv.text: And the anger of the Lord was kindled against Uzzah, and he struck him down because he put out his hand to the ark, and he died there before God.

cnv.text: 於是耶和華向烏撒發怒，因為烏撒伸手把約櫃扶住，所以　神把他擊殺，他就在那裡死在　神面前。

ccb.text: 因他伸手碰了约柜，上帝便向他发怒，击杀了他，他就死在上帝面前。
